title: Gambling!
body: So, this datapack was a really random idea I had which I thought was funny. Just a filler project between the main I am currently working on. It really is a very bare-bones datapack for now. Only the roll is working. No special effects, no particularly good animations, just simple stuff for a silly datapack I made in a whim. IF (for whatever reason) this datapack gets any attention I MIGHT just update it. And turn it into a "proper" (if it can even be considered proper at all) datapack, with full functionality.
